text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: We're here at last! I'm so super-duper-ultra excited for summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Buuut... this isn't just time to jump for joy! Isn't that right, Trainer?

Right... While summer camp is our chance to train, there's also a
special event happening this year.

There's a race that follows the road from the beach all the way to
camp... And Kawakami Princess has entered to run.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I even thought all about the most important things from the movie!
Today we've got to show off the true bond between a princess and
her prince!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, I thought I smelled a commoner. It's the same smell of
cheap noodles that, unlike authentic ramen, will live out their life in
anonymity!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's you! Dark Princ—ahem—I mean, the bully from before!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text: Heh... I suppose you hope to join the race today? I wouldn't recommend it, since I'll be participating.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh... I'm sure even you understand now. You'll never win
against a real princess, so why don't you just slink off—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Never! There's no way I'll back down from this battle! As a fighting
princess, I'll be there, with my prince by my side!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! You just don't learn, but have it your way... I'll simply have to
crush you underfoot this time!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I can't really compare to her. I might hate it, but I saw
the truth when we raced.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Still... I won't run away from this! I have to win! We have to combine
our powers to defeat her, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: So we need to start strategizing right away! First things first...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A name for our battle plan! I'm thinking either, "The Princess and
Prince's Big Banquet" or "The Power of Two - Winds of Victory!"
Which one do you like?
choice_data_list: We can always think of the name later...

text_block_list.text:
After our strategy meeting, the day gets even hotter, leading into the
fiery race we've prepped for!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text: Well, look at you! All that confidence, only to get worn out so soon!

text_block_list.name: Student Caster
text_block_list.text:
We're past the midpoint! The hot summer sun must be taking a toll on
their stamina! Who will pull ahead?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Hehehe! Make way for a real princess! Raaaaagh!

Someone in the back is sprinting all the way to the lead... It's Dark
Princess!

text_block_list.name: Student Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're almost at the finish line! It looks like first place is going
to—hold on!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: HIIIYAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Student Caster
text_block_list.text: Kawakami's pulled away from the pack! That's one big burst of speed!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text: Huh?! But she was exhausted. Where's that power coming from?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hraaagh! Princess Acceleration... times a trillion!

text_block_list.name: Student Caster
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami's caught up to the lead right before the finish! Who will
claim the win?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... You don't know who you're messing with! Victory goes to... the true—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: It goes to the princess with a true bond! And that's MEEE!

text_block_list.name: Student Caster
text_block_list.text: Finish! First place goes to... Kawakami! She won by a nose!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hah! I did it! Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text: N-no... This can't beee! How... How could I lose?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I saw through your trick. You're good at charging ahead from the
back during the last leg.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text: What did you say?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I did lose to you once, so my trainer found out all about you.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's why our plan was to wait until you went full strength, then I'd
dish out all my power at once and return the favor! It's called...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"Princess Power Times a Trillion - Demolish Dark Princess with Our
True Bond!" Catchy, huh?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Still though, we put all that work into our strategy, but it was a close
one! You really are a tough enemy!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text: Hmph... I don't need your pathetic consolations!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Come on, we're not enemies anymore since the race is over! That's a
Princess Fighter promise! From today on, we're friendly rivals!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text: Hah, you like Princess Fighter? I stopped watching that years ago.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
What?! I knew it—you're a Princess Fighter fan too! Cause all your
lines were just like Dark Princess!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text:
E-enough of that! You're totally wrong! I only watched it when I ate
instant noodles at snack time...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes, yesss! This is a victory for the powerful bond between a
princess and her prince!

It's just us on the moonlit beach, and Kawakami Princess is filled with
glee after her big win.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I forgot, Trainer! There's something I really wanted to try if I won! Can
we?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, okay, here it is! Um... You remember the last part of the
movie? I want to recreate it with the two of us!
choice_data_list: The last scene in Princess Fighter?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! On their way home after saving Earth, the princess and prince
have a heart-to-heart on the moon!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Let's see... Ahem! O-okay, here I go!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: "Prince... We did it... We saved the planet."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: "But this isn't the end. Everyone's waiting for us back on Earth!"
choice_data_list: "You're right. Our race isn't over yet."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"No matter the battle, I will overcome it! Because I... I am with my one
and only prince!"

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Aaaah! The bond between them really is special!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (And the prince of my destiny... is right here in front of me!)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! With the power of our bond, we're going to perform the
greatest miracles the world's ever seen!
